Your unfair AI advantage
Learn deeper, act faster, and grow like never before. With AI analytics, all you have to do is ask.
AI Agents
Sense, analyze, and optimize your data-driven issues 24/7.
Learn more

Learn more
AI Feedback
Transform what your customers say anywhere into action.
Learn more
AI Visibility
Reveal how LLMs talk about your brand so you can win AI search.
Learn more
Understand what your customers want—and give it to them
Amplitude gives you the self-serve tools and real-time data to make products and experiences that win no matter what.
Clearer insights
Where others guess, get the quantitative and qualitative answers to all your user questions.

→
"I sold the philosophy internally for a new way to do product. … We quickly realized there is only one tool that works for this, and it’s Amplitude."
Damien Delautier
Chief Product Officer, Groupe Canal+
Outcomes speak louder than words
Hear from our customers about the aha moments that have led to unfair wins.
“Until we looked at Amplitude reports, we didn’t realize what was happening. We immediately took action, saving us revenue.”
How we increased conversions by 27% with behavior insights
Cliff Kim
VP of Data and Analytics
“Amplitude allows us to really action our data. Going beyond just the insights, we’re now able to engage users in ways that are most meaningful to them.”
How we boosted activation by 40% with better onboarding
Madison Lukaczyk
Senior Manager of Business Intelligence
“We saw a 40% increase in new subscribers. Everyone was astounded by the results because it’s not common to see such a significant improvement.”
How we grew subscribers 40% with personalized content
David Gao
Principal Product Manager

Feature list showcases the new platform suite as of April 2026, which includes Analytics, Guides and Surveys, Feature Experiment, Web Experiment, Activation, AI Feedback, AI Assistant, and Session Replay. Access to individual products, whether for existing or new customers, is contingent upon purchasing either the new platform suite or individual add-ons outlined in the customer’s Order Form.
Frequently Asked Questions
What is an MTU?
An MTU (monthly tracked user) is a unique user with one or more events in an organization within a calendar month. It can be either an anonymous user (which Amplitude will track via device ID) or an identified user (tracked by user ID).
How can I estimate MTUs?
MTU count is similar to the monthly active users (MAU) count on your website or applications, provided it accounts for anonymous visitors identically. For more information on how to estimate and track MTUs, please refer to our MTU Help Center article
here
.
Do you offer special pricing or discounts for startups?
Yes! The Amplitude Startup Scholarship provides one year of our paid Growth plan features for free.
Learn more and apply here
.
Other questions? Let's talk.

docs.text:
Amplitude Documentation
Docs
Get Started
Products
Admin
Developers
FAQ
Search docs…
⌘ K
/
Full width
Send your first event
in under five minutes.
Amplitude’s docs cover everything from your first
track()
call to cohort-targeted experiments at scale. Pick a stack, copy the snippet, and go.
Get Started
CLI
AI Prompt
Snippet
Code
Add your API Key
Run in your terminal — detects your framework automatically.
npx @amplitude/wizard
Copy
The wizard detects your framework, installs the right SDK, adds your API key, and fires a test event.
Learn more in the guide.
Products
Explore by product area
Amplitude AI
AI-powered insights and predictions
Ask questions in plain language — Amplitude AI surfaces answers across all your data.
Global Agent Overview
AI Visibility
Amplitude MCP Server
AI Context
Data
Govern your event taxonomy
Define events once, validate on ingest. A single source of truth your team can trust.
Get started with Data
Create a tracking plan
Enable Autocapture
Validate events
Analytics
Understand product behavior
Charts, dashboards, and insights. Build funnels, segment users, answer "why".
Build an event segmentation chart
Build a funnel chart
Create user cohorts
Create a dashboard
Session Replay
Watch real user sessions
See exactly what users experience. Replay sessions with full event and network context.
Get started
Targeted capture

Analyze engagement within page regions
Define zones on any page and measure click rates, exposure, scroll reach, and rage clicks per region.
Get started

Instrumentation

Click map
Selector map

Run visual A/B tests on any page — no engineering required to get started.
Set up Web Experiment
Out-of-the-box widgets
Targeting
Actions

Run feature flags + A/B tests
Ship with confidence. Test variants, target segments, measure causal lift.
Quick start
Create a feature flag
Target by cohort
Analyze experiment results
AI Assistant
In-product AI support that takes action
Embed an agent grounded in your help content and user behavior. Answer questions, guide flows, and complete tasks for users in the moments that matter.
Get started
Use the AI Assistant
Configure AI Assistant
Resource center
Guides and Surveys
Engage users in-product
Deliver targeted guides, onboarding flows, and surveys at exactly the right moment.
Overview
Get started
Build a survey
Guide templates
Find your path
Pick a guide tailored to your role
Every team works with Amplitude differently. These role-based quickstarts skip the noise and walk you through the workflows that matter for your day-to-day.
For developers
Instrument, ship, and debug
SDK setup, event tracking, identity, and clean shutdown — built for engineers who want copy-paste-ready snippets.
Install an SDK in five minutes
Validate events end-to-end
Wire up identity and groups
Start your path
For PMs and analysts
Answer product questions, fast
Build funnels, retention, and segmentation charts. Save dashboards and share insight without writing SQL.
Build your first chart
Create user cohorts
Share a dashboard
Start your path
For marketers
Drive campaigns from real behavior
Activate cohorts in your marketing stack, measure attribution, and run growth experiments with confidence.
Sync cohorts to ad platforms
Measure marketing impact
Run growth experiments
Start your path
For data teams
Govern, validate, and export
Define a single tracking plan, enforce schema on ingest, and pipe clean event streams into your warehouse.
Build a tracking plan
Validate events on ingest
Export to your warehouse

Amplitude Integrations
Connect your customer data stack
Connect the leading data and marketing platforms to Amplitude.
Don’t see what you need? We can integrate with any system.
Contact us
Featured integrations
Twilio Segment
Twilio Segment collects and unifies customer data, making it easy to deliver personalized experiences across every channel.
Learn more
Braze
A comprehensive customer engagement platform that powers relevant experiences between consumers and brands they love.
Learn more
Amazon Web Services S3
Provides a simple web-services interface that can be used to store and retrieve any amount of data, at any time, from anywhere on the web.
Learn more
HubSpot
HubSpot is an all-in-one marketing tool that helps attract new leads and convert them into paying customers.
Learn more

Pipeline
1Flow
1Flow is a fast & easy way to understand your customers in-product, so you can reduce churn, grow faster, and build the right features.
Aampe
Agentic infrastructure to deliver continuously personalized experiences
Accoil
Track B2B account and user health and engagement using your Amplitude data. Accoil spots churn risks, conversion blockers, and expansion opportunities—giving CS, sales, and product teams the insight to act on real product behavior.
Adapty
Adapty helps to analyze and grow in-app subscriptions, integrate in-app purchases within a few hours, and run monetization experiments faster and cheaper.
Adjust
Adjust unifies all your marketing activities into one powerful platform, giving you the insights you need to scale your business.
Adobe Analytics
Adobe provides analytics and optimizations for mobile apps and brings together all marketing capabilities across Adobe Marketing Cloud.
Airbridge
Airbridge is a people-based, multi-touch attribution, and incrementality measurement platform helping marketers measure the true sources of their growth and confidently optimize their marketing campaigns.
Airship
Airship powered the first commercial mobile app messages and then expanded its data-led approach to all re-engagement channels (mobile wallet, SMS, email), app UX experimentation, no-code native app experience creation and App Store Optimization.
Amazon
Technology company which focuses on e-commerce, cloud computing, digital streaming, and artificial intelligence.
Amazon S3
Provides a simple web-services interface that can be used to store and retrieve any amount of data, at any time, from anywhere on the web.
Android Kotlin SDK
With Android Koitlin SDK, you can send events to our Analytics service or any other analytics or marketing tool.
Android SDK
With Android SDK, you can send events to our Analytics service or any other analytics or marketing tool.
Appcues
Supports personalized, targeted in-app onboarding messages, modals, and hotspots to guide specific user segments through a tour or to pinpoint key page elements.
AppFit
AppFit helps teams review, flag, & discuss their Amplitude metrics on a weekly basis.
Apphud
Apphud can send in-app subscription events into Amplitude to help enrich your Amplitude user profiles with subscription revenue.
AppsFlyer
The world’s leading data-driven marketers trust AppsFlyer for independent measurement solutions and innovative tools to grow their mobile business.
Apptimize
Apptimize empowers product teams to create the best possible experience for individual users through data-driven A/B tests and personalized promotions/feature releases.
Apxor
Connection information for Apxor <-> Amplitude Cohort Sync
AWS Kinesis Data Stream
Amazon Kinesis makes it easy to collect, process, and analyze real-time, streaming data so you can get timely insights and react quickly to new information.
AWS Kinesis Firehose
An extract, transform, and load (ETL) service that reliably captures, transforms, and delivers streaming data to data lakes, data stores, and analytics services.
Azure Blob Storage
Azure Blob Storage is a scalable, cost-effective cloud storage solution provided by Microsoft Azure that allows for storing large amounts of unstructured data, such as text or binary data.
Azure Blob Storage
Azure Blob Storage is Microsoft’s cloud object storage solution, optimized for storing massive volumes of unstructured data such as images, text files, audio files, backups, and logs.
Batch
Batch is a 360° customer engagement platform for CRM teams.
Batch (Profile)
Batch is a 360° customer engagement platform for CRM teams.
BigQuery
BigQuery is Google's fully managed, petabyte scale, low cost analytics data warehouse.
Blitzllama
Launch targeted in-product surveys using Blitzllama and stream feedback data to Amplitude.
Blueshift
Blueshift is an intelligent customer engagement platform that helps brands deliver relevant, connected experiences across every customer interaction. Blueshift’s AI platform provides the only all-in-one solution for data, decisioning and delivery.
Branch
The industry-leading mobile measurement and deep linking platform, trusted by the top ranking apps to increase efficiency and revenue. The best in mobile use Branch.
Braze
A comprehensive customer engagement platform that powers relevant experiences between consumers and brands they love. Braze helps foster human connection through interactive conversations across channels.
C# SDK
The C# SDK allows you to send events to our Analytics service.
Census
Census empowers data and business teams to sync cloud data warehouses to business tools so they have access to the data they need.
Chameleon
Send Chameleon data to Amplitude, and use behavioral cohorts to target Chameleon Experiences.
Chisel
Chisel is an AI-powered, enterprise-grade PM Agent with a built-in Feedback + Roadmap system of record
Clay
Clay integration to stream data into a Clay table
CleverTap
CleverTap is a modern, integrated retention cloud that empowers digital consumer brands to increase customer retention and lifetime value. With this integration, you can ingest event data from CleverTap into Amplitude for further analysis.
CommandBar
Use cohorts for Who targeting in CommandBar
Contentful
Contentful is a cloud-based, headless content management system (CMS) that separates content creation from presentation. It allows content to be delivered via APIs to any platform or device, enhancing flexibility and scalability.
Convizit
Convizit’s AI-based Digital Experience Data Platform automatically collects complete user behavior data on websites.
Cordial
Cordial is a customer engagement and data platform that unifies real-time data from anywhere in your technology stack, so you can engage with your customers in more personalized ways across email, SMS, mobile app, and more.
Customer.io
Customer.io helps you send automated email, push, SMS, and webhooks based on your customers’ activities and makes conversion tracking, optimization and re-marketing easier.
Databricks
Databricks is a unified, open analytics platform that enables building, deploying, sharing, and maintaining enterprise-grade data, analytics, and AI solutions at scale.
Datagrail
We give modern companies one easy-to-use platform to simplify, automate, and scale their privacy programs.
Datazoom
Datazoom enables video publishers to better operate distributed architectures through centralizing, standardizing, and integrating data in real-time to create a more powerful data pipeline and improve observability, adaptability, and optimization solutions.
Enterpret
Enables companies to analyze their customer feedback at scale and builds a comprehensive taxonomy of customer feedback on top of a unified source of truth.
Extole
Extole is the Customer-Led Growth platform. With Extole, marketers fight skyrocketing paid media costs by turning their customers into a primary vehicle for acquisition, awareness, and activation.
Facebook Ads
Facebook is one of the most efficient ways to advertise online. Create targeted cross-channel ads to more than 1.8 billion monthly users.
Fivetran
Fivetran is the leader in automated data integration, delivering ready-to-use connectors that adapt to change.
Flagsmith
We make it easy for any team to get up and running with feature management.
Flutter SDK
The Flutter SDK is an open-source UI for developing applications for Android, iOS, Windows, Mac, Linux, Google Fuchsia and the Web.
FullStory
Leverage Amplitude's SDK plugin architecture to send Amplitude events to FullStory.
GCS
A file storage web service for developers and enterprises that combines the performance and scalability of Google’s cloud with geo-redundancy, advanced security and sharing capabilities.
Google Ads
An online advertising platform developed by Google, where advertisers bid to display brief advertisements, service offerings, product listings, or videos to web users.
Google Analytics 4 (iOS/Android)
Amplitude CDP's Google Analytics 4 (iOS/Android) streaming integration enables you to forward your Amplitude events and users straight to Google Analytics 4 (iOS/Android) with just a few clicks.
Google Analytics 4 (Web)
Amplitude CDP's Google Analytics 4 (Web) streaming integration enables you to forward your Amplitude events and users straight to Google Analytics 4 (Web) with just a few clicks.

Google Play, also branded as the Google Play Store and formerly Android Market, is a digital distribution service operated and developed by Google.

hits.title: Tell HN: Amplitude (YC W12) just went public – AMA
Mobile Analytics Platform Amplitude (YC W12) Takes On Flurry and Mixpanel

analysis.name: Amplitude
analysis.tagline: The AI analytics platform for faster answers, testing everything, non-stop optimization, growing relentlessly
analysis.value_proposition: An AI-powered digital analytics platform that unifies product analytics, experimentation, session replay, and in-product engagement so teams can understand user behavior and act on it without leaving the platform.
analysis.ideal_customer: Product, engineering, data, and marketing teams at digital-native companies (B2B SaaS, mobile apps, ecommerce, media, fintech) seeking a unified analytics-to-action platform with AI-native capabilities.

features.name: product analytics
features.description: Event-based behavioral analytics with funnels, retention, segmentation, and user journey charts
features.evidence_quote: Dig deeper into every click and metric to make smarter decisions with confidence.

features.name: marketing analytics
features.description: Marketing-specific metrics and attribution with a single line of code instrumentation
features.evidence_quote: Get the metrics you need with one line of code

features.name: session replay
features.description: Record and replay real user sessions linked to behavioral events for qualitative context
features.evidence_quote: See what users are actually doing and understand the behavior behind your metrics.

features.name: heatmaps
features.description: Aggregate click, scroll, and selector data across sessions into visual engagement maps
features.evidence_quote: Aggregate click, scroll, and selector data across sessions into visual maps of user engagement.

features.name: click map
features.description: Visual overlay showing where users click across a page

features.name: scroll map
features.description: Visual overlay showing how far users scroll down a page

features.name: selector map
features.description: Heatmap variant showing interaction data scoped to specific CSS selectors

features.name: zoning insights
features.description: Define named zones on any page and measure click rates, exposure, scroll reach, and rage clicks per region
features.evidence_quote: Define zones on any page and measure click rates, exposure, scroll reach, and rage clicks per region.

features.name: guides and surveys
features.description: Deliver targeted in-product guides, onboarding flows, and surveys at the right moment
features.evidence_quote: Deliver targeted guides, onboarding flows, and surveys at exactly the right moment.

features.name: feature experimentation
features.description: Run feature flags and A/B tests with cohort targeting and causal lift measurement

features.name: web experimentation
features.description: Run visual A/B tests on any web page with no engineering required
features.evidence_quote: Run visual A/B tests on any page — no engineering required to get started.

features.name: feature management
features.description: Feature flag system for targeted rollouts and release management

features.name: multi-armed bandit experiments
features.description: Adaptive experimentation that automatically shifts traffic to winning variants

features.name: mutual exclusion groups
features.description: Prevent users from being enrolled in conflicting A/B tests simultaneously
features.evidence_quote: Mutual exclusion groups to scale A/B tests

features.name: web experimentation code editor
features.description: Full code editor for custom web experiment variants beyond the visual editor

features.name: amplitude ai
features.description: Overarching AI layer providing natural-language queries, automated insights, and predictions across all product data

features.name: ai agents
features.description: Autonomous agents that sense, analyze, and optimize data-driven issues 24/7 without manual intervention
features.evidence_quote: Sense, analyze, and optimize your data-driven issues 24/7.

features.name: amplitude global agent
features.description: AI agent for querying Amplitude data and surfacing insights via natural language prompts
features.evidence_quote: Three Tips for Better Prompts in Amplitude Global Agent

features.name: ai visibility
features.description: Monitor and reveal how LLMs and AI search engines represent your brand
features.evidence_quote: Reveal how LLMs talk about your brand so you can win AI search.

features.name: ai feedback
features.description: Aggregate and distill unstructured customer feedback from any source into actionable signals

features.name: amplitude mcp
features.description: MCP server allowing users to query Amplitude data from Claude, Cursor, or any MCP-compatible AI tool
features.evidence_quote: Prompt new Amplitude insights in Claude, Cursor, or any AI platform.

features.name: ai assistant
features.description: Embeddable in-product AI agent grounded in help content and user behavior that can answer questions and complete tasks
features.evidence_quote: Embed an agent grounded in your help content and user behavior. Answer questions, guide flows, and complete tasks.

features.name: data governance
features.description: Define, validate, and enforce event taxonomy with a shared tracking plan as single source of truth
features.evidence_quote: Define events once, validate on ingest. A single source of truth your team can trust.

features.name: tracking plan
features.description: Structured schema definition for events and properties enforced at ingest

features.name: autocapture
features.description: Automatic event capture without manual instrumentation

features.name: event validation
features.description: Real-time validation of incoming events against the tracking plan schema

features.name: behavioral cohorts
features.description: Segment users by behavioral patterns and actions for analysis and targeting

features.name: funnel analysis
features.description: Multi-step conversion funnel charts with drop-off analysis

features.name: retention analysis
features.description: Cohort-based retention charts showing user return rates over time
features.evidence_quote: Understand your customers like no one else

features.name: event segmentation
features.description: Chart builder for analyzing any event broken down by any property

features.name: dashboards
features.description: Custom dashboards to aggregate charts and share insights across teams

features.name: custom audiences
features.description: Build and sync custom audience segments to advertising and marketing platforms

features.name: predictive audiences
features.description: ML-powered audience prediction for targeting users likely to convert or churn

features.name: causal insights
features.description: Causal inference analysis to identify what actually drives key metrics

features.name: cross-product analysis
features.description: Analyze user behavior and journeys across multiple distinct products in one view

features.name: real-time streaming and syncs
features.description: Stream events and sync audiences to destinations in real time

features.name: activation
features.description: CDP-style data activation layer to unite and sync data across teams and tools

features.name: feature tagging
features.description: Tag product features to automatically track adoption and usage without new event instrumentation

features.name: advanced data permissions
features.description: Granular role-based access controls and data visibility restrictions for enterprise teams

features.name: warehouse-native analytics
features.description: Run Amplitude analytics directly on data stored in the customer's data warehouse

features.name: warehouse export
features.description: Export clean event streams from Amplitude into customer data warehouses

features.name: sdks (browser, ios, android, react native)
features.description: Official client and server SDKs across all major platforms for event instrumentation
features.evidence_quote: Client + server libraries — Browser, iOS, Android, React Native

features.name: cli wizard
features.description: npx-based CLI that auto-detects framework, installs SDK, and fires a test event in minutes
features.evidence_quote: The wizard detects your framework, installs the right SDK, adds your API key, and fires a test event.

features.name: benchmarks
features.description: Industry benchmarking tool to compare product metrics against peers

features.name: dashboard templates
features.description: Pre-built dashboard templates to kickstart common analyses
features.evidence_quote: Kickstart your analysis with custom dashboard templates

features.name: cohort targeting for experiments
features.description: Target A/B test variants to specific behavioral cohorts

features.name: persisted properties
features.description: Carry user properties forward through the funnel to connect pre-conversion behavior to sales outcomes
features.evidence_quote: Tracing the Sale: Connect Behavior to Conversions with Persisted Properties

features.name: session replay targeted capture
features.description: Capture session replays selectively based on specific events or user segments

features.name: session replay privacy controls
features.description: Mask or exclude sensitive fields from session replay recordings

features.name: web analytics
features.description: Web-specific analytics with dynamic content targeting across the full customer journey
features.evidence_quote: Find out firsthand what moves the needle and target dynamic content across the entire customer journey.

features.name: web experimentation out-of-the-box widgets
features.description: Pre-built conversion widgets (banners, modals, etc.) for web experiments without custom dev

features.name: integrations (sources and destinations)
features.description: Connect 157+ data and marketing platforms as event sources or audience destinations

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on support as part of advanced enterprise permission controls

features.name: customer success management
features.description: Assigned account manager and expert guidance for enterprise customers

features.name: startup program
features.description: Free year on Growth plan for early-stage startups with under $10M funding and fewer than 20 employees
features.evidence_quote: Startups with under $10M in funding and fewer than 20 employees receive one free year on our Growth plan.

features.name: community and academy
features.description: Peer community and self-serve training academy for onboarding and skill development

features.name: amplitude mcp server
features.description: Dedicated MCP server endpoint enabling AI tools to query Amplitude data via the Model Context Protocol

features.name: segmentation for web experimentation
features.description: Audience segmentation controls for targeting web experiment variants

features.name: advanced behavioral analysis
features.description: Deep behavioral analytics beyond basic segmentation, including pathfinder and microscope-style views

features.name: prompt library
features.description: Curated library of AI prompts for Amplitude agents to accelerate common analysis workflows
features.evidence_quote: Prompts for Agents to get started

differentiators: Unified platform covering analytics, experimentation, session replay, heatmaps, in-product guides, and AI agents in one product
AI Visibility feature monitoring how LLMs represent your brand in AI-generated search results
Amplitude MCP Server enabling natural-language queries to Amplitude from Claude, Cursor, and any MCP-compatible AI tool
AI Agents that autonomously sense, analyze, and optimize data issues 24/7
Warehouse-native analytics allowing customers to run Amplitude on their own data warehouse
Causal insights engine distinguishing correlation from causation in product data
Command AI acquisition (now AI Assistant) enabling embedded in-product AI guidance grounded in behavioral data
MTU-based pricing with a free tier and transparent per-MTU calculator on Plus plan
11,000+ digital products instrumented; 174% YOY growth cited

praised: Strong market reception at IPO (YC W12 AMA thread: 416 upvotes, 150 comments)
Recognized as G2 Leader and Customer Favorite with 2,500+ reviews
Command AI acquisition seen as positive product expansion (HN: 92 upvotes)
complaints: No G2 review content was available in source data
No Reddit or detailed HN complaint threads surfaced in provided sources

free_tier.limits: 10K MTUs / 2M events per month; unlimited feature flags; Session Replay included

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: 10K MTUs, 2M events, analytics, session replay, unlimited feature flags, web experimentation, AI Feedback

tiers.name: Plus
tiers.headline_inclusions: Up to 300K MTUs or 25M events, unlimited product analytics, behavioral cohorts, feature tagging, custom audiences

tiers.name: Growth
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom MTU/event volume, feature experimentation, causal insights, predictive audiences, real-time streaming

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom volume, cross-product analysis, advanced permissions, mutual exclusion groups, multi-armed bandit, account manager

pricing.notes: Plus plan is usage-based (MTU or event volume), not seat-based; pricing calculator on page shows $0.049/MTU with $49/mo base. Growth and Enterprise are contact-sales only. Startup program offers free Growth year for companies with <$10M funding and <20 employees. MTU = Monthly Tracked User.
